---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

### Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see.

### Use Case

Explain the problem this feature would solve. What are you trying to accomplish?
How do you currently work around this limitation (if at all)?

### Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you have in mind. How would it work from a user's perspective?

### Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, describe them and explain
why your proposed solution is preferable.
